title: The Council of Engineering
text:
A council of AI experts discussing solutions from different perspectives
To get started: (1) Add your Anthropic API key in the settings dialog in the top-right corner, (2) Write your problem statement or question in the box below, and (3) Click "Start Discussion" to begin the AI council's deliberation.
Pioneer of object-oriented programming
Creator of Linux and Git
NASA's software engineering pioneer
Waiting for discussion to start...
